arts.ttl: Watch Dortmund vs Bayern with our tactical cam!
arts.sum: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich travel to fifth-placed Borussia Dortmund in a huge clash on Saturday afternoon.
The team sheets for this evening's "Top-Spiel" between FC Bayern München and Borussia Dortmund are in.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer joins top 10 players with most Bundesliga appearances
arts.sum: Neuer played in his 512th Bundesliga game in Bayern's trip to Borussia Dortmund on Matchday 12 of the 2024/25 campaign, drawing level with retired goalkeeping counterpart Uli Stein in the all-time rankings. Now an 11-time Bundesliga champion, among others, Neuer ranks as the division's only goalkeeper on at least 100 appearances to have conceded fewer goals (434) than games played (512).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich eyeing RB Leipzig left-back David Raum if Alphonso Davies leaves
arts.sum: Leipzig left-back David Raum (26) is one of the names being considered by Bayern to replace Alphonso Davies, should the latter leave the club next summer. Max Eberl has a good relationship with Raum from their time together in Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Match Thread: Borussia Dortmund Look to End Bayern’s Unbeaten Streak
arts.sum: Streaming: ESPN+ (USA), Sky GO UK, and Sky Go (Germany) Use those and don’t share any illegal streams in the comments.

arts.ttl: Gittens for England? Dortmund winger adds another stunner
arts.sum: While former Borussia Dortmund star Jude Bellingham was enduring a torrid Champions League night at Anfield, another Englishman currently at the Bundesliga club was lighting up the competition.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Bayern Munich – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund face Bayern Munich for the 136th time since the Bundesliga was formed this weekend. Nuri Sahin’s side find themselves fifth in the table after 11 gameweeks, while FC Hollywood lead the way at the top with no defeats so far. Dortmund are missing Emre Can, Karim Adeyemi and Filippo Mané for this tie, […] The post Borussia Dortmund vs Bayern Munich – Match Preview and Team News first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel pondering January loan offers from European clubs only if his situation at Bayern Munich does not improve
arts.sum: However, if his situation does not improve in the next few weeks, a loan move in January could become an option, as regular match practice is essential at his age. Since his move to Bayern in 2022, Tel has never considered going out on loan and he still wants to stay and establish himself at the club.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Bayern Munich: Live stream, Game time thread, How to watch
arts.sum: Bayern Munich travel to the magnificent Westfalenstadion / Signal Iduna Park to face Borussia Dortmund in this edition of Der Klassiker . Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund without Julian Brandt for Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten report that Borussia Dortmund will be without Julian Brandt for today’s Klassiker against Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga Topspiel. The 28-year-old was doubtful heading into the game following…
